name: DiffuMamba: High-Throughput Diffusion LMs with Mamba Backbone
summary: arXiv:2511.15927v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive (AR) generation, yet their reliance on Transform...
description: arXiv:2511.15927v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive (AR) generation, yet their reliance on Transformer backbones limits inference efficiency due to quadratic attention or KV-cache overhead. We introduce DiffuMamba, a masked diffusion language model built on a bidirectional Mamba backbone that combin...
author: Vaibhav Singh, Oleksiy Ostapenko, Pierre-Andr\'e No\"el, Eugene Belilovsky, Torsten Scholak
